title: デビュー戦の後に・カワイイよ広がれ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan has finished her debut. When she
comes back to the waiting room, she's so calm
that it's hard to believe she just ran a race.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh! My engagement is looking pretty good! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Remember how I posted on Umastagram right
before the race? Look at all the likes and
comments I've gotten!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At her insistence, I look at her post.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"I was watching!" "Great race!" "What an amazing
debut!"
choice_data_list: Looks like everyone was cheering for you.
Looks like everyone was cheering for you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I'm so happy! Thinking about my fans
watching me makes me wanna do whatever I can
not to let them down. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But... I guess I can't make everyone happy. Look
at the latest comments.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Curren was in that race?" "I didn't see her." "Who
cares about racing?" "Post your outfits too! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
In reality, there are more comments from people
who aren't interested than there are from people
cheering me on. It's only my debut, though, so I
guess that's normal enough.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But... I wanna get more people interested in my
running.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And not just my fans, of course. People who like racing, people who aren't interested yet... I want everyone to notice me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She told me before that she wants everyone to
know about "Cute Curren." With this in mind, I
have to imagine those last comments were
disappointing.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, I wanna work on increasing my brand for a
while!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, I wanna work on increasing my brand for a
while!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I mean... If I'm gonna run, I want tons of people to
be actually watching me!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So first things first—I need people to know that
I'm running in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
In any case, we're focusing our training on getting
my distance up for the time being, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I figure I can use that time to do some
self-promotion too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since her goals are to earn the Triple Tiara and
raise her profile, I guess it's true that we don't
have to decide on a race goal for the near future.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I knew you'd understand. ♪ I'll do my best to get
my name out there!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I knew you'd understand. ♪ I'll do my best to get
my name out there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our current goal is for us to work
together to make her better known while
continuing to train!
